export class TimeOfDayParser{constructor(){this._data={hhmm:'00:00',phase:'DAY'};}flush(){this._data={hhmm:'00:00',phase:'DAY'};return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;// MUST match compose order in TimeOfDayComposer
this._data.hhmm=wrapper.readString();this._data.phase=wrapper.readString();return true;}get data(){return this._data;}}
